creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  Next time please make your shar a relative one, as not 
everyone uses /usr/ports/blah/blah2.  I.e., please make it only create blah2/*. 
Also, I would like if you ask the steghide maintainers/developers not to use 
hyphens in their version numbers anymore.  Thanks.
